name: WD as compression lever + byte-shuffle/brotli + XSA F.normalize fix
author: Victor Fiz
hardware: single RTX 3070 (8 GB VRAM), 7000 steps, 10 train shards
note: Non-record findings on the compression side of the pipeline. val_bpb measured locally on a single RTX 3070; not validated on 8xH100 yet. One verified finding (XSA F.normalize fix), one single-point observation (byte-shuffle+brotli), one un-isolated hypothesis (Muon WD as compression knob) — see README for the evidence breakdown.
